working_on: Close Issues #77 (doubt-driven evaluation) + #116 (validator_runtime_phase_regression on duration_structural_ms) via productively coupled deliberate-A → doubt-B → land-A sequencing per plan i-want-to-rustling-walrus.md.
outcome_summary: Closed Issues #77 + #116 via productive-coupling deliberate-A → doubt-B → land-A. ADR 0084 (Option 2: CLAUDE.md pushback-rule extraction-step extension) lands per decision drawer drawer_paideia_decisions_0e32491466e0a2bab67529ae; the doubt-driven audit at engine/docs/audits/doubt_driven_evaluation.md applies CLAIM→EXTRACT→DOUBT→RECONCILE to ADR 0049 (modest gain), ADR 0054 (unverified premise at line 137 falsified at S-0137 → ADR 0076 cost), ADR 0063 (structural-phase composition assumption falsified at S-0127), and Phase A1's #116 proposal. Pattern: each historical failure was a falsifiable-by-cheap-test confident assertion not run at author-time. Phase A2 landed Path A inverted-index optimization in validate_adr_back_reference_orphan per decision drawer drawer_paideia_decisions_a8049aec3679dd2231d4aa37; structural phase 593ms → 491ms (1.93× speedup on the hot check, under 500ms target with +9ms headroom); validator_runtime_phase_regression CLEARED. 193/193 validate tests green. Cascade per ADR 0041: ADRs 0049/0054/0063 each gained See-also back-pointer to ADR 0084. Engine ADRs: 45 Accepted.

scope_delivery.explanation: Both Issues closed exactly as planned. Phase A2 path leaning evolved during execution (cache-only → inverted-index) after the first attempt delivered only 5% speedup; the pivot to inverted-index was self-driven via the standing pushback rule (in-session profile measurement disconfirmed the I/O-bound hypothesis). The doubt-driven workflow's outcome choice (Option 2 over Options 1/3/4) was driven by the audit's findings, not a pre-committed direction. No user adjudication needed mid-session; both AskUserQuestion calls were at plan time.
